words.def: fear resulting from the awareness of danger
words.zh: n. 驚恐, 警報, 警鐘

words.def: the most common computer memory which can be used by programs to perform necessary tasks while the computer is on; an integrated circuit memory chip allows information to be stored or accessed in any order and all storage locations are equally accessible
the month following February and preceding April
words.zh: vt. 損毀, 損傷, 糟蹋

words.def: a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb
words.zh: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狹長港灣, 武器

words.def: a flat wing-shaped process or winglike part of an organism
